last_commit.message: feat: PROJECT_BOOTSTRAP_PLAYBOOK v0.3 — visual enrichment + voice memos as first-class raw

recent_changes: 2026-04-21: Playbook v0.3 published — added Core Principles 6 (Visual enrichment: Gemini-vision sidecar .md convention) and 7 (Voice memos as first-class raw input). Directory layout expanded with raw/photos/, raw/voice-memos/, wiki/SOURCES.md, wiki/ASKS.md. Prerequisites now include .env with GEMINI_API_KEY.
2026-04-20: /wiki-compile skill added at .claude/commands/wiki-compile.md. Reference implementation from HD-Dev passes 2-6. Auto-registers in any Claude Code session.

2026-04-19 to 04-21: HD-Dev bootstrap trial (6 passes, PR #1 merged). Validated full playbook flow with Will Kreth / Human & Digital. Trial writeup at analysis/2026-04-19-hd-dev-bootstrap-trial.md. Session checkpoint at analysis/2026-04-21-session-checkpoint.md.

2026-04-21 (in flight): Skyline bootstrap trial launched — second live application of playbook v0.3, co-run with brother Ed. Terminal-first, Gemini-enrichment-from-day-one. Separate repo at ~/Development/Skyline, to be pushed to januff/Skyline.
Bookmark fetch 2026-04-18: 38 NEW tweets (600 total), full enrichment pipeline, vault export (590 notes)

Notable new (04-18): @claudeai Managed Agents (56979), auto mode (39185); @karpathy LLM KBs (56369); @trq212 Claude Code channels (25659), /ultraplan (10349); @bcherny hidden CLI thread (23135); @noahzweben /schedule (4352), Routines (3646)
known_issues: Quote tweets not captured in schema or extraction (only quote_count stored)
x.com photo/video URLs (30 remaining) need browser-based enrichment
Obsidian v1.11.7 installed — needs update to 1.12+ for CLI support
Briefing generator produces double @@ in author handles
Pre-compact hook may not capture enough structured context (only STATUS.json)

Claude-in-Chrome extension (v1.0.52): connection reliability issues documented (40+ GitHub issues). Fixed locally via Desktop config rename + tengu_copper_bridge=false + stable native host path. May revert on updates.
tengu_copper_bridge in ~/.claude.json may be reset to true by server-side GrowthBook sync — re-check if connections degrade

active_task.description: Public launch — README rewrite, community map, weekly rhythms, repo audit
active_task.note: Deprioritized during 2026-04-19..21 HD-Dev bootstrap trial. Resume when Skyline bootstrap stabilizes.

hd-dev-trial.status: PR #1 merged 2026-04-20, 6 passes complete, awaiting Will's chat archive / MDM 2.0 doc

skyline-trial.status: bootstrap Pass 1 in flight as of 2026-04-21; first test of playbook v0.3 with visual enrichment

pending_followups: Add ASKS.md as a spine file in HD-Dev Pass 7 (human-only asks ledger, inverse of DECISIONS.md). Playbook v0.3 documents the pattern.
Draft next Will prompt: pings-between-terminals architecture once ASKS.md exists.
Reconcile claude-code-tips active_task — either retire the stale 'Public launch' plan or resume it after trials.
HD-Dev `documents/` folder fully deprecated; all sources in raw/documents/. No further action needed there.
